description: Unattended-operation preset for mature, well-compensated setups: interruptions reserved for effects that cannot be undone.
overrides_allowed: per-tool overrides toward stricter stances; loosening below confirm for uncompensated external effects is not representable
notes: Intended for daemon/long-horizon runs. Safe only where compensations are tested and checkpoints are on; pair with budget alerts so autonomy is bounded by spend as well as by stance.
